nasb.text: “Then it will come about on the day of the Lord’s sacrifice That I will punish the princes, the king’s sons And all who clothe themselves with foreign garments.

esv.text: And on the day of the Lord’s sacrifice— “I will punish the officials and the king’s sons and all who array themselves in foreign attire.

cnv.text: “到了我耶和華獻祭的日子， 我必懲罰首領和王子， 懲罰所有穿外族衣服的人。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“在我献祭的日子， 我必惩罚首领和王子， 以及所有穿外族服装的人。
